diagrams.title: Bubble Sort Pass Example
diagrams.description: Shows how Bubble Sort moves the largest element to the end through adjacent swaps in one pass
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how largest element bubbles up in each pass

diagrams.title: Selection Sort Example
diagrams.description: Shows minimum element selection and swapping with first unsorted position
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how minimum is selected and placed in sorted portion

diagrams.title: Insertion Sort Example
diagrams.description: Shows how each element is inserted into its correct position in sorted portion
diagrams.purpose: Understanding card-sorting analogy and growing sorted portion

diagrams.title: Quick Sort Partition Example
diagrams.description: Demonstrates partitioning around a pivot element (pivot=10)
elements: Now recursively sort left and right subarrays
diagrams.purpose: Understanding divide and conquer with pivot-based partitioning

diagrams.title: Merge Sort Recursion Tree
diagrams.description: Shows the division and merging process in Merge Sort for 8 elements
elements: Merge back up combining sorted portions
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing divide, conquer, and combine steps
